title: myosotis scorpioides var. pratensis
intro: Myosotis scorpioides var. pratensis, also known as the small-flowered forget-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, antitussive, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Myosotis scorpioides var. pratensis have been associated with various health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues, such as coughs and asthma, as well as the alleviation of digestive problems and skin irritations. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
